title: SkinCraft
description: Create, edit, and share custom Minecraft skins without ever leaving the game. Skincraft offers 2D/3D skin editor, community skins, and capes for Fabric.
body:
# SkinCraft - In Game Minecraft Skin Editor for Fabric

**Create, edit, and share custom Minecraft skins without ever leaving the game.**
SkinCraft is a client-side Fabric mod that brings a full skin editor directly into Minecraft: 2D pixel painting, 3D model preview, community skin browsing, and cape selection, all in one place. Press **K** to open.

No browser tabs. No file hunting. Just open and start creating.

## ✏️ In-Game Skin Editor

- Full **2D pixel editor** for precise control over every pixel of your skin
- Interactive **3D model view**: paint directly on your character and see changes live
- Tools include **eyedropper** (sample any color from your skin), **AutoTone**, and standard paint tools
- **Undo / redo** support while editing
- Save and apply your skin directly from the editor, no manual file moving

## 🌐 Community Skins

- Browse and preview **community-uploaded Minecraft skins** without leaving the game
- **Search by name**, filter by **category**, and page through results
- **Apply** a community skin instantly or **Save** it to your local skins folder
- **Share your own skins** to the community with a name, category, tags, and description
- Right-click drag to rotate the 3D preview of any community skin
- Works fully offline: local mode stays available even if the community service is unreachable

## 🧥 Cape Selection

- **Many bundled capes** included out of the box: `corrupted_grass`, `dull_creeper`, `golden_heart`, `nillionth`
- Select and wear a cape from the in-game menu, no extra websites or file setup
- Your cape choice is saved across restarts
- More capes added with each update

## 🗂️ Skin Management

- Import skin files directly from within the game UI
- Open your skins folder from inside the mod, no file explorer digging
- Manage all your custom skins from one screen

## The honest reason to use it

Most Minecraft skin tools make you leave the game, open a browser or a separate app, edit your skin, export it, then re-upload through the Minecraft launcher. **SkinCraft cuts all of that out.** Everything lives inside Minecraft, making skin creation fast, visual, and actually fun.

Whether you're building a full custom character from scratch or just tweaking small details, SkinCraft is designed to fit how you already play.

## Requirements

- **Minecraft Java Edition** (client-side only, no server install needed)
- **Fabric Loader** 0.19.2 or newer
- **Fabric API** matching your Minecraft version

## Install

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for your Minecraft version
2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and drop it in your `mods` folder
3. Drop `skincraft-<version>.jar` into your `mods` folder
4. Launch Minecraft and press **K** in-game

SkinCraft is in **active development**. New tools, cosmetics, and community features ship with each update. Bug reports and suggestions are welcome on the Modrinth project page (version comments) or reach out on Discord **`@darkshydow`** for quick questions 💙
